lines.speaker: Arena Guard Rachi
lines.text: This is the Emir's Arena. Fighters come from far and wide to arrange fights against their friends and rivals. They can fight in 1v1 Tournaments or Duels.

lines.speaker: Arena Guard Rachi
lines.text: Head over to the hospital north of the Arena, and speak to the Guides. They'll help you sign up to a fight. Now, can I help you with anything else?

lines.speaker: Arena Guard Rachi
lines.text: The Emir of Al-Kharid has decreed that his Arena should be guarded, to stop ruffians like the Calamity Coven from returning. But is there something I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the Calamity Coven.

lines.speaker: Arena Guard Rachi
lines.text: The Calamity Coven were three brigands, followers of an ancient and derelict religion. Through their foul arts, they turned this Arena into a hotbed of corruption.

lines.speaker: Arena Guard Rachi
lines.text: Maoma was a captain of the Emir's guard, but she abused her authority to rig fights so that the Coven would get rich at the people's expense.

lines.speaker: Arena Guard Rachi
lines.text: Saika was the brains behind their operation, forging the Arena's accounts so that the Coven could keep all the profits, starving the Emir's public works of all funding.

lines.speaker: Arena Guard Rachi
lines.text: Koriff used her charms to act as a gracious hostess, whipping up the crowds' excitement so that they'd gamble more and more unwisely, enriching the Coven.

lines.speaker: Arena Guard Rachi
lines.text: The Calamity Coven are long gone now; some of their old possessions are even being sold as rewards. Now, we are here to prevent a resurgence in such crime. But is there something I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you give me some merching tips?

lines.speaker: Arena Guard Rachi
lines.text: That's why I became a guard...
